name: coTfsLssSendConfigureNodeIdResponse
title: coTfsLssSendConfigureNodeIdResponse
syntax: long coTfsLssSendConfigureNodeIdResponse( dword errorCode, dword specificError );
description: This function sends the LSS configure node-ID response.

parameters.name: errorCode
parameters.description: Error code. 0 - protocol successfully completed1 - node-ID out of range255 - implementation specific error occurred

parameters.name: specificError
parameters.description: Manufacturer specific error (used if error code = 255).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
